resumeSet.signature: resumeSet(cwd: string, setId: string, options?: object): Promise<object>
resumeSet.description: Single resume function in execute.cjs replacing both handleResume() and execute resume code paths

withMergeStateTransaction.signature: withMergeStateTransaction(cwd: string, setId: string, mutationFn: (state) => void): Promise<void>
withMergeStateTransaction.description: Atomic read-validate-mutate-write wrapper for MERGE-STATE.json, mirroring withStateTransaction() pattern

singleResumePath.description: All resume operations must route through the single resumeSet() function -- no duplicate code paths

transactionalStateMutation.description: execute update-phase must use withStateTransaction() -- no direct STATE.json mutation

atomicMergeState.description: All MERGE-STATE writes must go through withMergeStateTransaction() -- no direct fs.writeFileSync calls
